creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
Confirmed with 3.5.0 on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-b63021e00 amd64, FreeBSD clang version 14.0.5 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-14.0.5-0-gc12386ae247c)

The strange thing is native should be equal to penryn anyway.

$ grep -e '-target-cpu' | sed -e 's|.*-target-cpu \([[:alnum:]]*\) .*|\1|'"                       
penryn
